# Master English Book
> An interactive English learning platform for Bengali speakers by Red Rose Corporation.

## What This Site Is
Master English Book is a free structured English learning resource. It contains chapters, lessons, vocabulary, grammar, and video explanations aimed at Bengali-speaking learners.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.masterenglishbook.com
- All Books: https://www.masterenglishbook.com/book
- Chapters & Lessons: https://www.masterenglishbook.com/book/{slug}
- Privacy Policy: https://www.masterenglishbook.com/PrivacyPolicy
- Terms & Conditions: https://www.masterenglishbook.com/TermsAndConditions
- Sitemap: https://www.masterenglishbook.com/sitemap.xml

## Content
- Structured English lessons with titles, descriptions, and explanations
- YouTube video lessons embedded per topic
- Organized by chapters and sub-lessons
- Keyword-tagged content for searchability

## About
- Publisher: Red Rose Corporation
- Website: https://corporation.redrosebd.com
- Audience: Bengali speakers learning English
- Language: English content, Bengali instruction context

## Android App
- Master English Book Android app available on Google Play
